title: Console Remastered
description: Tries to replicate the Console Edition feel without losing Much performance
body:
# Console Remastered

Console Experience馃幃Modern Features鉁匨ax Performance馃殌

This Modpack is looking the same like the Legacy 4J Versions while having all the new Features of up to 1.20.1 while still having amazing performance due to Performance mods.
The pack also contains Controller Support with Zoom (Left Control pad).
The Old Legacy Skin Packs are also Included so that you can change them In-Game.
Use this Modpack as a base for other mods, so you can Experience Modern Mods while still Having a Nostalgic Feel.
